song.title: I Need Thee, Oh, I Need Thee
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C V4 C V5 C
song.lyrics: [V1] . G C G 1) I need Thee every hour, most gracious Lord; . D7 G A7 D7 No tender voice like Thine can peace afford. [C] . G D7 I need Thee, Oh, I need Thee; . G Every hour I need Thee; . C G Oh, bless me now, my Savior! . D7 G I come to Thee. [V2] . G C G I need Thee every hour, stay Thou near by; . D7 G A7 D7 Temptations lose their pow’r when Thou art nigh. [V3] . G C G I need Thee every hour, in joy or pain; . D7 G A7 D7 Come quickly and abide, or life is vain. [V4] . G C G I need Thee every hour, teach me Thy will; . D7 G A7 D7 And Thy rich promises in me fulfill. [V5] . G C G I need Thee every hour, most Holy One; . D7 G A7 D7 Oh, make me Thine indeed, Thou blesséd Son.
